violations.text: Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination (raw chicken stored above raw beef). Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. PIC rearranged. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients were not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
Inspector observed small dead flies on tape in kitchen area. PIC informed to remove. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
Inspector observed knifes stored between prep sink and 2 door cooler. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -walk-in cooler (fan blades, ceiling, walls) -kitchen fans (in wall), -storage shelves (old droppings), -shelf under dishwasher (old droppings). New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
The following is in poor repair: -leak under 3 bay prep sink, -ceiling near hood (pealing paint). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Take out boxes were observed being stored on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (bagged celery) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Various food product was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Large food bins containing chicken wings was observed cooling on the counter.PIC informed of proper cooling methods. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
Boxes and containers of food product were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Prep unit located in the cooks line area was not in good repair. Ambient temperature 60DF. PIC removed food product that was placed there an hour prior to inspection was moved to another unit. Establishment not allowed to store TCS foods in unit until replaced/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
